# Vendored browser assets

These files are vendored so the generated site does not depend on third-party CDNs at runtime.

- `alpine/alpine.min.js` — Alpine.js 3.14.9 CDN build, MIT license.
- `highlight/highlight.min.js` — Highlight.js 11.11.1 browser build, BSD-3-Clause license.
- `highlight/nix.min.js` — Highlight.js 11.11.1 Nix language module.
- `highlight/tokyo-night-dark.min.css` — Highlight.js 11.11.1 Tokyo Night Dark theme CSS.
